creator: per@kaffe.mustafejen.se
text:
Hello!

I tried to recompile vlc and mplayer with a lot of non-default make options checked. atk seemed to bee a dependency, but pkg-static complained.

pkg-static: atk-2.38.0 conflicts with at-spi2-core-2.46.0 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/include/atk-1.0/atk/atk-autocleanups.h

A lot of other packages depended on at-spi2-core-2.46.0, so my choice was not to deinstall it.
